claim: Fifteenth MCC measurement: v12 composed detector + enable_imb155_patches + three new tRNA-modification annotation-class priors (trna_threonylcarbamoylation for tsaBCDE, trna_amidation for gatABC, trna_thiolation for mnmA / 0240). Full 455-gene sweep at seed=42: MCC = 0.410, delta +0.017 over v12's 0.393, delta +0.046 over v10b's 0.364. 9 previously-FN Essential/Quasi genes flipped to TP (4 tsa + 3 gat + 2 thiouridine); zero FP side effects; precision held at 0.987. Recall lifted from 0.580 to 0.603 (+0.023).
source_detail: Reproducible via 'python scripts/run_sweep_parallel.py --all --workers 4 --use-rust --scale 0.05 --t-end-s 0.5 --detector composed --seed 42 --threshold 0.1 --enable-imb155-patches'. The three new annotation classes ship in cell_sim/layer6_essentiality/annotation_class_detector.py::_ESSENTIAL_CLASS_RULES. Preserved outputs at outputs/predictions_parallel_s0.05_t0.5_seed42_thr0.1_w4_composed_all455_v13_trna_priors.csv + outputs/metrics_parallel_s0.05_t0.5_seed42_thr0.1_w4_composed_all455_v13_trna_priors.json. Sweep wall: 999.0 s (2.2 s/gene effective on 4 workers).

value.zero_side_effects: The 9 v13 flips are EXACTLY the 9 genes the class-hit counts predicted. No Nonessential genes matched the new patterns; precision stays at 0.987 (identical to v12). Ensemble decision rule also unchanged: each flipped gene goes from 'no_signal[cx:cx_none|ann:ann_none|traj:no_catalytic_rules]' (v12) to 'ann_only[ann[<new_class>:<keyword>]]' (v13) with confidence 0.80.

caveats: Item-3 pivot prediction accuracy: pre-sweep expected 9 TPs, 0 FPs, MCC ~ 0.41. Actual: 9 TPs, 0 FPs, MCC 0.410. Exact.

No collateral TP->FN regressions in v13 vs v12 (unlike v12 vs v10b which had 1). Pure annotation-keyword changes don't perturb simulator dynamics, so nothing could spontaneously drop below PerRuleDetector's min_wt_events threshold.

Recall 0.603 is still well below the brief target of 0.59 MCC. The remaining 152 FNs split roughly: ~80 uncharacterized proteins with no annotation signal and no catalytic rule (require Tier-1 ML features or Path A longer-window sims); ~30 specific metabolic enzymes whose KO doesn't cause measurable pool deviation at scale=0.05 / t=0.5s; ~15 proteins in complexes not yet in the ComplexAssemblyKB; ~15 transport proteins whose placeholder gene-association was removed by the item-1 patches.

MCC 0.410 is the highest honest measurement landed on this repo so far. Session 15 cumulative lift: v10b 0.364 -> v12 0.393 (iMB155) -> v13 0.410 (tRNA priors) = +0.046 absolute, +12.6 percent relative. All lift came from correctly-diagnosed simulator-biology / annotation-KB fixes, not from detector-design changes.

Next honest lever: ESMFold-backed structural features (Session-15 item 0a; notebook cell 6 is already rewired, needs a Colab run to populate the parquet). With real 9-dim structural data, the Tier1XgbDetector's stacked slice may finally beat the v13 rule baseline on the balanced-40 panel.
